title: Integrate hop sequence into Node, Medium, Simulation for CCP-12 rendezvous and channel selection
description: Update node.py hop_schedule based on SFN/time, medium.py get_rx_candidates and detect_activity to compute expected hop channel via synchronized_hop_channel, simulation.py to pass SFN/epoch to TX/RX decisions. Match ccp9_rendezvous.json and ccp16-hop.json. Use independent oracle. Reference protocol.py:XX. No dead code, follow existing patterns.
